stemHtml: When is wake turbulence risk the highest?

options.a: When a heavy aircraft has just performed a take-off at a closely situated parallel runway with a light crosswind.
options.b: If just before landing a much lighter aircraft has landed at the same runway with heavy crosswind.
options.c: When a preceding aircraft has briefly applied reverse-thrust just prior to take-off.
options.d: Following a preceding aircraft at high speed.
